violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the dining room and receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
A soap dispenser was observed at the food prep sink. Handwashing aids and devices may not be placed at sinks other than food prep sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, knives, mixer, wall-mounted potato chopper,) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The ice bin at the bar had an accumulation of debris and broken glass. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of black/brown residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Chowder was observed with a date mark that exceeds 7 days. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of cook, shrimp was placed hot in the prep unit in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Frozen cooked lobster was observed thawing in stagnant water in the food prep sink. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large and small droppings throughout establishment, and a large amount of nesting materials inside and the outside the walk in cooler. PCS Griggs & Brown monthly. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

The door to the outside, located in the dining room, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in coolers and storage hallway.Some food observed stored on shelves that are not at least 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Tongs were stored on an unclean surface (dirty shelf) between uses. Pizza utensils observed stored on the unclean top of oven. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Water observed in blender bowls, and stacked glasses at the bar.After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen and bar. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the storage hallway.Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
A drop cooler and lowboy were not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
The whisk for the mixer was not in good repair, with broken and unattached wires. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris.1. Refrigeration 2. Shelving 3. Tables4. Fryer5. Vents 6. Fans7. Dish machine8. Mixer9. Grease trap10.Potato chopper11. Clean storage rack in dishroom12. Bar glass refrigerator at bar New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The condensate from the refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2024
The hand sinks in the kitchen are dirty and need to be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
The grease recycling bin has an accumulation of grease and debris.The bin should be cleaned or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024

The floors throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of rodent droppings, food debris and soil residue. The floors, walls, and ceilings including in the walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in areas of the establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2024
